Author: ak
Date: Fri Dec  6 10:33:25 2013
New Revision: 335730
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/335730

Log:
  - Update pkgng patch to 8.0.6
    * Fix issue with pkgng when the dependent packages are not installed
  
  PR:	ports/184528
  Submitted by:	Ken DEGUCHI <kdeguchi@sz.tokoha-u.ac.jp> (maintainer)
